narrative:
Precinct St Clairsville 4-B (precinct in Belmont County) has 444 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.2 percentage points.
